Title: Kim Possible
Actors: Christy Carlson Romano, Will Friedle, Nancy Cartwright
Plot: Kim possible-not just an ordinary girl. She is a cheerleader and she saves the world, even on school nights. With her sidekick, best friend and now new boyfriend and his naked mole rat (Rufus) go through normal teenage life while saving the world. what else can she do.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 1 win & 15 nominations total
